svg.title: Full RAG comparative evaluation pipeline with all saved files
svg.desc: Three stages: Stage A retrieval produces two JSONL files, Stage B generate produces results.jsonl, Stage C evaluate produces five CSV files.
svg.text: Stage A — retrieval.py (your existing systems, run once)
Stage B — generate.py (reads stored retrieval, no retriever calls)

g.text: both retrievers converge to same shape

svg.text: Stage C — evaluate.py (reads results.jsonl, runs 3 tiers)
